title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF DALLAO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORDON, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO DALLAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 434 / 55 OG No. 18, 3266 (May 4, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2119, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF DALLAO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORDON, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO DALLAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Dallao in the Municipality of Cordon, Province of Isabela, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as barrio Dallao.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959.
